admin.title: Admin panel

form.slugHint: Leave empty — generated from the title
form.metaTitleHint: Leave empty — falls back to the record title
form.metaDescriptionHint: Up to ~160 characters. Shown in Google results
form.ogImageHint: Preview when shared on social networks. Empty — falls back to the main image
form.videoHint: MP4 or WebM, up to 64 MB. Empty — the banner falls back to a static background
form.telegramHint: e.g. https://t.me/obsigma. Empty — the header button points at Contacts
form.heroImageHint: Used when no video is set. The slow zoom is applied automatically
